description: Bridge from the KubeSynapse runtime's /tools/<name> interface to an upstream GitHub MCP server over streamable HTTP. A GitHub token must be forwarded in the request header.

tools.name: call_upstream_tool
tools.description: Proxy any tool call to the upstream GitHub MCP server.

parameters.name: tool_name
parameters.description: Name of the GitHub MCP tool to invoke (e.g. create_issue, get_file_contents).

parameters.name: github_token
parameters.description: GitHub personal access token forwarded via the X-GitHub-Token header.

tools.returns: Result from the upstream GitHub MCP server.
tools.whenToUse: Use when the user asks to interact with GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, files, or workflows and the platform has configured a GitHub MCP upstream.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when the task can be accomplished with local git commands or when no GitHub token is available.
